stepfunctions.statemachinealias.CfnAbout:
Represents a state machine [alias](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/step-functions/latest/dg/concepts-state-machine-alias.html). An alias routes traffic to one or two versions of the same state machine.

You can create up to 100 aliases for each state machine.

stepfunctions.statemachinealias.Descript.Description: An optional description of the state machine alias.

stepfunctions.statemachinealias.Name.Description: The name of the state machine alias. If you don't provide a name, it uses an automatically generated name based on the logical ID.
